use_cases: Displaying a list of tasks or setup steps with real-time status indicators for onboarding flows
Showing sync progress for items like product imports or data synchronization
Tracking completion status of multiple items in a checklist interface
Providing visual feedback when users click to synchronize individual cards
Creating an interactive progress tracker for multi-step workflows
ai_summary: An animated task status list component that displays cards with three states: completed, updates-found, and syncing. Features smooth CSS animations cycling through dash patterns for loading states, hover effects on cards, and click-to-sync functionality with automatic status transitions. Designed for tracking multi-step setup or synchronization workflows in SaaS applications, with accessibility support for reduced motion preferences.
